name: Catskill Mountain Jalapeno French Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Active dry yeast (Red Star is best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use "El Rio Jalapeno strips" for this bread.
2. Set the machine to French/crusty mode; otherwise, use standard/white bread mode.
3. Enjoy your creation. Remember that you were warned when your mouth starts yelling "Fire!" Donna...Catskill Mtns, NYS 11/03 01:02 am
